code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut result = ""
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let v = match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      let sq = v * v
      if string.is_empty(result)
        result = "#{sq}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{sq}"
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  let v = match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let sq = v * v
  if string.is_empty(result)
    result = "#{sq}"
  else
    result = "#{result} #{sq}"
  end
end

println(result)
